articles.author: Alessio Palumbo
articles.title: Xbox Layoffs Have Reportedly Gutted id Software, Obsidian, and ZeniMax Online, and Elder Scrolls Online’s Roadmap Will Have to Change - Wccftech
articles.description: Xbox layoffs have reportedly hit id Software, Obsidian, and ZeniMax Online hard, forcing changes to The Elder Scrolls Online's roadmap.
articles.content: Under the guise of the great Xbox reset, Asha Sharma's big scissors have cut heavily among the internal studios. While none of the studios that were in danger of being closed will actually be shut do… [+2916 chars]

articles.title: New Quantum Sensor Opens a Window Into the Invisible Universe - SciTechDaily
articles.description: Results from a UK collaboration mark a major advance toward building large-scale quantum sensors.
articles.content: A breakthrough quantum sensor has shown it can uncover hidden signals through overwhelming noise, paving the way for future searches for dark matter and ancient gravitational waves. Credit: SciTechDa… [+10386 chars]
